name: MoneyGram
description_short: Orlando, FL's MoneyGram at 5300 S John Young Parkway offers check cashing and money transfers with extended daily hours.
description_long:
The MoneyGram location at 5300 S John Young Parkway in Orlando, FL operates as a standalone branch with convenient access from major roads. This Orlando facility is open daily from 8AM to 10PM, making it easy for residents to visit during their preferred time.

At this S John Young Parkway location, you can cash checks, arrange money transfers, and access other financial services. Call +1 800-746-7287 with questions about processing times, fees, or specific services available at this branch.

When visiting the Orlando location, bring a valid government-issued ID for any check cashing or money transfer transaction. The extended daily hours make this S John Young Parkway MoneyGram convenient for working residents and those with variable schedules.
address: 5300 S John Young Pkwy, Orlando, FL 32839

company_info.headquarters: 5300 S John Young Pkwy, Orlando, FL 32839

pros: Extensive network of 13,000+ locations across the United States for high accessibility
Offers both online and in-person transaction options for customer flexibility
Provides multiple services including money transfers, check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment in one location
Interactive map-based location finder with multiple search methods (address, city, state, ZIP)
Established brand with long operational history in money services industry
No apparent account opening requirements mentioned, suggesting accessibility for unbanked/underbanked consumers
Same-location capability for multiple financial needs reduces customer travel burden
cons: Website content does not disclose fee structures, making cost comparison impossible before visiting a location
No pricing transparency visible for money transfer rates or check-cashing fees
Limited service details on website—processing times, transfer limits, and restrictions not disclosed
As a check-cashing service, likely carries higher fees than traditional banks for comparable services
Location-dependent service quality and hours may vary across different agent locations
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing immediate access to check-cashing without account requirements
Domestic money senders who prioritize location convenience over lowest cost
Customers in areas with limited banking infrastructure who need bill payment and money order services
Consumers preferring in-person transactions over purely digital money transfer services
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers who value location convenience and need immediate access to check-cashing and money transfer services without traditional banking relationships. The main caveat is that fee transparency is entirely absent from their public website, requiring customers to visit or call locations to understand actual costs—a significant limitation when evaluating value against competitors.
meta_description: MoneyGram at 5300 S John Young Pkwy, Orlando, FL. Check cashing and money transfer services, open daily 8AM-10PM.
